label: Bundle Actions
description: Simulate (dry run) and submit bundle actions with leg count badge and status feedback.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.5.note: No mock imports in widget file.

0.6.note: Context is pure local state (no async fetch); no isLoading field.

0.8.note: Context has no error field; WidgetErrorBoundary handles render errors.

0.9.note: No dead code. readOnly from context disables Simulate and Submit buttons in batch mode.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass (0.6, 0.8 N/A for pure local-state context).

1.1.note: Data sourced from useBundlesData() hook (steps, readOnly).

1.2.note: Context calls useGlobalScope() and filters templates by org DeFi desk presence.

1.3.note: Org filter changes scoped templates via hasDefiDesk memo.

1.4.note: Action-panel widget; no per-client data to cascade.

1.5.note: Action-panel widget; no per-strategy data to cascade.

1.6.note: Empty scope arrays → hasDefiDesk=true → unfiltered templates returned.

1.7.note: Reference data (BUNDLE_INSTRUMENTS, BUNDLE_VENUES, ALL_OPERATION_TYPES) in lib/config/services/bundle.config.

l1.notes: All checks pass. 1.4, 1.5 N/A for action-panel widget.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live=full actions available; paper=full actions (testnet); batch=readOnly=true, buttons disabled.

3.2.note: Context reads isBatch and isPaper from useExecutionMode(); readOnly=isBatch wired to widget.

3.3.note: Human verify: batch mode → Simulate and Submit buttons visually disabled.

3.4.note: Human verify: batch/as-of indicator visible in layout.

3.5.note: Paper mode: gas estimate halved (testnet gas cheaper); buttons remain enabled for paper execution.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or setInterval in this widget or bundles context; no realtime connections to disable.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1, 3.2, 3.5, 3.6 complete. Human must verify 3.3 (visual button disable in batch) and 3.4 (layout batch indicator).

4.1.note: Simulate and Submit buttons have no onClick handlers — dead buttons. Known issue flagged for L4 wiring.

4.3.note: Human: verify leg count badge and button states are correct.

4.4.note: Human: click Simulate → expected dry-run flow; Submit → bundle submission.

4.5.note: No links to gated pages in this widget.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks inside the widget render — entitlements gate at page/registry level.

l4.notes: Agent checks 4.2, 4.5, 4.6 pass. 4.1 FAIL — dead buttons (known issue, L4 scope). Human must complete 4.3, 4.4.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all bundle-based strategies that produce multi-leg execution plans (Flash Loan Arb, Basis Trade, DeFi Deleverage, CeFi multi-leg). Widget is the final submission gate for any bundle regardless of strategy.

7.2.note: No mock imports in widget file.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo/useCallback in this widget; no perf anti-patterns.

l7.notes: All L7 checks pass. 7.5 globally deferred.

8.1.note: Replaced text-[11px] (line 15) with text-caption and text-[10px] (line 22) with text-micro. Tokens landed in globals.css (--text-caption, --text-micro).

8.2.note: No arbitrary spacing values (p-[, m-[, gap-[).

8.3.note: Uses Button, Badge from components/ui/*. No custom interactive divs.

8.4.note: No img, no unlabeled inputs, no interactive divs without role. Icon-only buttons use text labels (Simulate/Submit text visible).

8.5.note: Human: verify at minW=3, minH=1 — flex-wrap layout should adapt.

keepSeparate.rationale: Actions widget is a narrow action bar (minH:1) that sits below the step editor and PnL strip. Merging into bundle-steps would significantly inflate that widget's height contract and break the preset layouts.

relationships.notes: Reads steps and readOnly from shared BundlesDataContext. Triggers are downstream of bundle-steps (step list) and bundle-pnl (P&L summary). Acts as the terminal action gate for the entire bundle workflow.

dataContract.notes: Widget dispatches bundle submission commands. In production, Simulate calls Tenderly simulation API; Submit routes to execution service. No polling — command/response pattern.

gaps: Simulate button has no onClick handler — dry-run not wired
Submit button has no onClick handler — submission not wired
coverage.notes: Widget is strategy-agnostic at the UI level — it submits whatever steps are in the bundle context. Coverage is limited by the dead-button gap (L4 issue).

knownIssues: Simulate (dry run) button has no onClick handler — dead button (L4 scope)
Submit bundle button has no onClick handler — dead button (L4 scope)

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: bundle-actions-widget.tsx:15 — text-[11px] used; bundle-actions-widget.tsx:22 — text-[10px] used. No tailwind token exists for sub-xs sizes.
findings.fix: Replaced text-[11px] with text-caption (--text-caption 0.6875rem, existing 11px token) and text-[10px] with text-micro (--text-micro 0.625rem, new 10px token) (2026-04-21)
